name: phased-dev
description: Agent-driven phased development workflow built on a scope abstraction. Each scope declares its own pipeline; shipped pipelines cover standard projects (brainstorm → engineering → plan → implement), design-heavy projects (brainstorm → ux → engineering → plan → implement, with full design language / component inventory / a11y contract), standard features (engineering → plan → implement), and design-heavy features (ux → engineering → plan → implement, for UX-led features like onboarding rewrites or editor modes). Bundles 10 unified slash commands (including rewind-phase and generate-ux-preview), role-separated subagents, per-task completion markers, per-feature status mirrors, and templates with phase gates and per-task execution logs.
